summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FinanceFlow application. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend UI loads correctly with proper navigation, but encountered form interaction issues with dropdown selections in transaction and budget creation dialogs.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown options not selectable via standard Playwright selectors
ui_bugs.description: shadcn/ui Select component requires specific interaction pattern for option selection

ui_bugs.issue: Category dropdown options not accessible with current selectors
ui_bugs.description: Similar issue to type dropdown - needs proper selector for shadcn/ui Select options

passed_tests: Backend API - Root endpoint (200 OK)
Backend API - Categories endpoint (200 OK)
Backend API - Transaction CRUD operations (100% success)
Backend API - Budget CRUD operations (100% success)
Backend API - Analytics endpoints (100% success)
Backend API - Tax estimation (100% success)
Backend API - Investment suggestions (100% success)
Backend API - Reports generation (100% success)
Frontend - Dashboard page loads correctly
Frontend - All financial metrics cards display
Frontend - Navigation sidebar functionality
Frontend - All page navigation works (Dashboard, Transactions, Analytics, Budget, Tax, Reports, Import)
Frontend - Import Data page UI displays correctly
Frontend - File upload zone is present and functional
Frontend - Supported file formats are displayed
Frontend - Transaction dialog opens correctly
Frontend - Budget dialog opens correctly
Frontend - Tax estimator page loads and displays
Frontend - Reports page loads and displays
Frontend - Analytics page loads with tabs
Frontend - Dark theme is properly applied
Frontend - No JavaScript console errors detected
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dropdown selection interactions in Transaction and Budget creation forms. The shadcn/ui Select components need proper data-testid attributes on the option elements or alternative selection methods. Current selectors like [role="option"][data-value="income"] are not working. Consider adding data-testid attributes to SelectItem components or using different interaction patterns.
